things.name: Alexander Nevsky Cathedral
things.description: One of the largest Eastern Orthodox cathedrals in the world with golden domes

things.name: Vitosha Mountain
things.description: National park on the city's doorstep with hiking, skiing and stunning summit views

things.name: Boyana Church
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage 13th-century church with exceptional medieval frescoes

things.name: Rotunda of St George
things.description: Sofia's oldest building, a 4th-century Roman rotunda with medieval frescoes

things.name: National Palace of Culture
things.description: Brutalist 1981 concert complex with panoramic city views from the exterior

things.name: Ivan Vazov National Theatre
things.description: Splendid neoclassical theatre, the oldest and most prestigious in Bulgaria

things.name: National History Museum
things.description: Bulgaria's largest museum with Thracian gold treasures and medieval jewellery

things.name: Sofia Synagogue
things.description: One of the largest synagogues in Europe with a 2,000 kg chandelier

things.name: Archaeological Museum
things.description: Outstanding collection of Thracian and Roman artefacts in a converted mosque

things.name: Central Sofia Market Hall
things.description: Art Nouveau covered market with local produce and traditional Bulgarian food
